narration: A trie is a word tree that stores one letter at each stop.
callout: The path start -> c -> a is shared.

narration: The words cat and car share the same beginning, then split at the last letter.
decision: A prefix is the beginning part that words can share.

predictionPrompt.prompt: Which letters form the shared prefix of cat and car?

choices.label: ca
choices.feedback: Correct. Both words share c then a.

choices.label: cat
choices.feedback: Not this one. The words split before the last letter.

narration: A trie also marks where a whole word ends, so to and top can both be stored correctly.
callout: The node for o can end one word even while more letters continue below it.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why is a word-end marker important in a trie?
